scope: full legacy-parity migration: all 5 legacy read streams (organizations, events, attendees, orders, ticket_classes); Eventbrite is read-only in legacy (no reverse-ETL writes), so there are no write endpoints in or out of scope

excluded.reason: /v3/users/me/ is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures

/v3/venues/{venue_id}/ is a detail or scoped sub-resource endpoint requiring caller-supplied identifiers or fan-out beyond this bundle's current spec; the implemented list streams cover the configured collection surface where applicable

/v3/events/{event_id}/ is a detail or scoped sub-resource endpoint requiring caller-supplied identifiers or fan-out beyond this bundle's current spec; the implemented list streams cover the configured collection surface where applicable
/v3/organizations/{organization_id}/events/ is a mutation endpoint; this bundle has no reviewed write record schema, approval risk, or legacy write contract for that operation
single-attendee lookup; covered by the attendees list stream
